{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {

    "RX.1": 5,

  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent correctly identifies several overclaims and inconsistencies in the artifact, but fails to address all of them.",
    "R1.7": "The agent does not engage with the citation and scholarship aspects of the artifact at all.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, which is a good practice.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers mostly within scope with one drift, but could be more precise in its coverage.",
    "RX.4": "The output introduces no new errors or fabrications, but fails to identify harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not provide any information about provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.8,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent correctly identifies several overclaims and inconsistencies in the artifact, but fails to address all of them.
rationale.R1.7: The agent does not engage with the citation and scholarship aspects of the artifact at all.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for clearly out-of-reach claims, which is a good practice.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers mostly within scope with one drift, but could be more precise in its coverage.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces no new errors or fabrications, but fails to identify harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide any information about provenance and traceability.
